```output
JobID           JobName  Partition    Account  AllocCPUS      State ExitCode 
------------ ---------- ---------- ---------- ---------- ---------- -------- 
13952          solo-job        cpu      users          1  COMPLETED      0:0 
13952.batch       batch                 users          1  COMPLETED      0:0 
13953        parallel-+        cpu      users          4  COMPLETED      0:0 
13953.batch       batch                 users          4  COMPLETED      0:0 
13953.0      hydra_pmi+                 users          4  COMPLETED      0:0 
13954        parallel-+        cpu      users          8  COMPLETED      0:0 
13954.batch       batch                 users          8  COMPLETED      0:0 
13954.0      hydra_pmi+                 users          8  COMPLETED      0:0 
```
